steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The colon explains the effect of the carte de visite: it made photography easy and enjoyable for everyday people, and people loved exchanging the small photos with friends and family.

steps.title: Choose the spread meaning
steps.content: A contradicts the passage because the photo format helped photography grow. B means verbally praise, but the sentence is about adoption. D conflicts with the exchanging of photos among friends and family. The answer is C.
